restaurants.ambience: Heritage building with tranquil courtyard, lush greenery and charming interior with artistic details
highlights: Fusion of Indian and international cuisines

highlights: Meeting point for artists, travellers, and locals

attractions.name: Mattancherry Palace
attractions.description: A 16th-century Portuguese-built palace, later renovated by the Dutch, renowned for its exquisite Kerala-style murals depicting Hindu epics
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Paradesi Synagogue and Jew Town
attractions.description: Historic synagogue with narrow lanes of Jew Town filled with antique shops and spice markets
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

attractions.name: Fort Cochin
attractions.description: Charming area with historic streets and unique Chinese fishing nets
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

attractions.name: Fort Kochi
attractions.description: A historic coastal town renowned for its colonial architecture, vibrant art scene, and cultural heritage
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Jewish Synagogue
attractions.description: The oldest active synagogue in the Commonwealth, renowned for its rich history and unique blend of Jewish and local Kerala influences
attractions.entry_fee: ₹5 for Indian visitors, ₹100 for foreign visitors
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: St. Francis Church
attractions.description: The oldest European church in India, renowned for its historical significance and as the original burial site of Vasco da Gama
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf

attractions.name: Chinese Fishing Nets
attractions.description: Traditional cantilevered fishing nets introduced by Chinese explorer Zheng He in the 14th century, offering a unique glimpse into Kerala's maritime heritage
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Faiz Kerela.pdf
